entry.title: Re: Where do I add a new object type to be viewed and add...
entry.content: Hi, this should work I guess. Thank you!

entry.title: Inquiry about issues stopping replication flow.
entry.content:
Hello Community,

I have been facing an issue with a replication flow that I have been trying to stop for a week, but without success. I would like to know if anyone has experienced something similar and could help me understand the possible causes of this problem.

I have tried several solutions, but the flow remains active. Could you suggest what else I might check or if there are any specific steps I should follow to resolve this issue?

I appreciate any guidance or advice you can offer.

Best regards

entry.title: Re: Content provider in SAP BWZ standard errors out with...
entry.content:
In extension landscape subaccounts, the URL should be like this: 

https://html5-apps-repo-rt.cfapps.us10.hana.ondemand.com/applications/cdm/incidents. Also the 
existing_destinations_policy: update is to be used to update the design time destination in case the destination has already been created. So example for the destination module goes as shown below:

 

- name: incident-management-destination-content
  type: com.sap.application.content
  requires:
  - name: incident-management-destination-service
    parameters:
      content-target: true
  - name: incidents_html_repo_runtime
    parameters:
      service-key:
        name: incidents-html5-app-runtime-service-key
  - name: incident-management-html5-repo-host
    parameters:
      service-key:
        name: incident-management-html5-repo-host-key
  - name: incident-management-auth
    parameters:
      service-key:
        name: incident-management-auth-key
  parameters:
    content:
      subaccount:
        destinations:
        - Name: incident-management_cdm
          ServiceInstanceName: incidents-html5-app-runtime-service
          ServiceKeyName: incidents-html5-app-runtime-service-key
          URL: https://html5-apps-repo-rt.cfapps.us10.hana.ondemand.com/applications/cdm/incidents
        existing_destinations_policy: update

entry.title: Re: Archiving - How it is designed, how does it work
entry.content:
Hello Horst,

real good blog, very useful hints.

We are planning to set up archiving in our Sales Cloud (C4C) test tenant first. I have one specific question before doing it. Our SAP C4C tenant is integrated with a SAP Marketing Cloud tenant as well as a SAP CRM 7.0 onPrem backend, with replication of business activities and other data synchronously stored in all these systems. Now if we assume that with activated Archiving in C4C a certain Activity is about to be archived: are there any events implicitly triggered or IDoc messages sent out from C4C to the connected systems causing the C4C-archived Activity to be archived in these systems, too ?

Thank you,

Mike

entry.title: Re: Please wait while the document is being processed
entry.content:
Try this link:

https://userapps.support.sap.com/sap/support/knowledge/en/1985571

entry.title: Re: Still unable to pass DateTime parameters with "MS OLE...
entry.content: Did you use the Database menu and set location using the new Client? Did ODBC work?

entry.title: Re: SAP Payroll HCM Advanced Leave Payment (Annual Leave)...
entry.content: Not sure if I understood it correctly. If Advance leave is paid for the months on leave, there is no need for additional payment. Once employee returns from leave, the regular would start from then. Business rule cannot impact mashup as mashup is in SAP system.

entry.title: Re: Trigger an outbound Idoc when a PR is created.
entry.content:
Hi Raymond, everythings done, all the connections has been established from my end (partner functions, logical system etc., ), now the Idoc is getting triggered whenever a PR is created in the System.

the only thing that is pending now is filling the Idoc_Data.

 

I am currently using the Idoc type PREQCR104, I successfully passed the data into the first segment which is 'E1PREQCR1' which is test_run as 'X' as below :

 

       wa_idoc_data-segnam = 'E1PREQCR1'.
        ls_header-testrun = 'X'.
        wa_idoc_data-sdata = ls_header.
        APPEND wa_idoc_data TO lt_idoc_data.
        CLEAR : wa_idoc_data. 

But, I am not getting how to pass the data into the below segments of the Idoc (lets say 'e1bpmereqheader'). If I pass the data as above, it is creating the Segment as Root but not as its child. How can I achieve this ?

 

I tried to go through the link you provided, but that was not helpful. Can you please help in filling these data records ?

 

Regards,

entry.title: Re: Success and Error messages in RAP validation logic
entry.content: Hmm, not really what I am aiming for. The call to RAP service returns the same entity list back to the frontend, but with additional fields populated (newly created transaction IDs). So I am looking forward of finding a way how to pass both successful entities (with new fields populated) and failed entities - with error messages. Not sure if it is even possible.

entry.title: Re: System Conversion to Microsoft Azure simplified with SAP Cloud Appliance Library
entry.content:
Thank you @veesatya1975  for the hint.
The technical whitepaper is not available anymore. I removed the link and added the recommendation to see the official guide instead.

entry.title: Re: Notification tab in Flexible Workflow for PO
entry.content: Hi. I faced a similar issue like the one you mentioned. For me the notification tab appeared after maintaining the email templates for approval and rejection.

entry.title: LOB Administration in a Db2 LUW database
entry.content:
Motivation

In this blog post, I’ll discuss space and performance considerations of large objects (LOBs)  in SAP environments on Db2 for Linux, UNIX, and Windows (LUW). You will learn how to address potential issues by configuration and maintenance. Key topics are , compactness, and inlining.

Note that not all information about LOBs is easily accessible. For convenience, in SAP environments the table function LOBALLOC assists administrators of Db2 LUW databases with investigating LOB space allocation.

 

How can you maintain the LOB object of a table?

You have the following options:

  • Run a REORG
  • Modify the LOB compactness
  • Modify the inline length

As all of these options may have considerable impact on daily operation, and since they also affect the space allocation, it is important to have some knowledge about the effect of these actions. I will demonstrate how the LOBALLOC table function can assist you.

 

Background

A table in Db2 LUW consists of the following objects:

  • Data object
  • Index object if indices have been created
  • LOB object if the table has LOB fields

In SAP environments, almost all tables have an index object. An index object of a table consists of all indices defined for the table. An LOB object is only allocated if the table has one or more LOB fields, i.e. fields of data type BLOB, CLOB, or DBCLOB. The LOB object of a table

  • contains all LOB fields of the table
  • is located in a tablespace that is determined at table creation time
  • typically holds data larger than the page size of the data object

While data and index objects are organised in pages and extents that are cached in the bufferpool, any LOB data is accessed from the file system directly. It is never cached in the bufferpool.

A table row with a non-empty LOB entry has a pointer in the data page that allows you to identify the location of the LOB entry. This pointer includes additional information, like the LOB size. Therefore, querying the LOB size does not require reading the LOB data itself.

 

Inlining

An individual LOB entry can be very large (up to 2 GB) or occupy only a few bytes. As the pointer to the LOB entry of a row is stored in the data page of the table, the space required for this pointer must be reserved. If the data of the LOB field is not larger than this pointer, the data is inlined. This means that the LOB portion of the row is directly stored in the data page.

 

Space consumption

LOB data is stored in segments of size [a power of 2] x 1024 bytes. The maximum segment size is 64 MB.

You can define LOB fields with the COMPACT keyword, or with NOT COMPACT which is the default. If defined with COMPACT, the space allocation for this field is optimised. The segments then use the next 1 KB boundary.

Compactness implies that the Db2 engine spends more time searching for free space during INSERT and UPDATE operations of LOB data. Note that compactness optimizes the space usage of an LOB field. There is no option to compress the LOB data itself.

For more information about LOB allocation, see https://www.ibm.com/support/pages/lob-space-allocation-and-management.

 

How do you get information on LOB objects?

The catalog tables of Db2 LUW do not provide any details on LOB objects other than their tablespace.

You can find out about the total size of an LOB object of a table using table function ADMIN_GET_TAB_INFO. The function ADMIN_IS_INLINED tells you whether an LOB field of a table row is inlined or not.

 

Maintaining an LOB object

Changing the inline length of an LOB field

You can modify the inline length of an LOB field of a table using an ALTER TABLE statement like this:

alter table <TABLE> alter column <COLUMN> set inline_length <n>

However, without further action, the modified LOB settings will apply to newly added table entries only. The changes apply only to new table entries and not to the table content that already exists.

If the LOB field belongs to a queue table where the content is very dynamic, after a certain amount of time, all old table entries should get deleted as part of the application design. All new LOB entries of the table will have the new inline length settings automatically.

If, on the other hand, the table content is very static, or if the data in the table will remain for an extended period of time, it takes extra effort to make the change effective for all LOB data in the table. For this, you need to reorganise the table including the LOB object as described in the next section.

Note:

  • If you increase the number of inlined LOB entries, you potentially increase the amount of data that is being cached in the bufferpool. As a result, increasing the inline length of an LOB field potentially increases the load onto the bufferpool area. You might need to increase the memory configuration accordingly.

 

Changing the compactness of an LOB field

The compactness setting of an existing LOB field is not changeable. If you need to modify this setting, the easiest way is to create a new table using the desired setting for this LOB field. The procedure ADMIN_MOVE_TABLE helps you copy the table content into the new structure and drop the original table. Read on to learn more about the procedure.

 

Reorganising an LOB object

Let’s assume you have a table with one or more LOB fields. If you have changed the inline length of an LOB field, and you want to make all entries in the LOB field aware of this change, you need to reorganize the LOB data.

However, the most common scenario is that update, insert, and delete operations result in an increased amount of free space in the LOB object. Such an LOB object is also a candidate for reorganisation.

 

What You Should Consider Before Reorganisations

There are several options to reorganize tables and LOBs. Before you decide to reorganize a table, see also SAP Note 1942183.

Db2 REORG

LOB objects potentially become quite large. In particular, candidates for a REORG are often large and may have sizes up to the range of terabytes. Note that a Db2 REORG of the LOB object of a table requires the additional clause LONGLOBDATA. This REORG is offline which means that during the REORG the table cannot be accessed. With a runtime that can take several days, or even weeks, this option often is ruled out.

In addition, if you need to restore a backup image and perform a ROLLFORWARD operation that covers a table REORG, this ROLLFORWARD is slowed down considerably which potentially increases the time required for DB recovery. The slow rollforward also affects HADR environments and may lead to repeated "hickups" of the DB for the time the REORG activity is rolled forward.

ADMIN_MOVE_TABLE and DB6CONV

Another option is to move the table into a new table using the Db2 procedure ADMIN_MOVE_TABLE. SAP Netweaver environments use a wrapper of ADMIN_MOVE_TABLE, see report DB6CONV which is available as attachment to SAP Note 1513862. During the use of the Db2 procedure, the table is fully operable and accessible. For a large table the process might take long, but it prevents the problems of a Db2 REORG approach.

In SAP Netweaver environments, DB6CONV is the recommended and frequently used method to reorganize tables.

 

Investigating an LOB object

As any reorganisation of an LOB object takes a long time and consumes a lot of resources, you are immediately faced with the question of how to decide whether a reorganisation makes sense or not. As mentioned, apart from the information provided by table function ADMIN_GET_TAB_INFO and function ADMIN_IS_INLINED, there is little that can be said about an LOB object. However, with the information about space allocation for LOBs depending on their compactness setting it is possible to derive further details.

 

Table function SAPTOOLS.LOBALLOC – check LOB free space

SAP environments can make use of table function LOBALLOC that is defined in schema SAPTOOLS (see SAP Note 3301718). The output fields are the following:

Here, the logical and physical LOB size is derived from table function ADMIN_GET_TAB_INFO. The output field LOB_OBJECT_O_SIZE is calculated using one of the 2 formulae fragments below for each entry that is not found to be inlined (the scalar function ceil() returns the integral part of a decimal number):

  • For COMPACT='N': 2 ^ ceil( log2 ( <field length> ) -10 )
  • For COMPACT='Y': ceil( (<field length> + 1023)/1024 )
    This is the field length rounded up to the next 1k boundary.

For the calculation, these numbers are summed up. The calculation also takes into account that the minimum allocation is 1k, while the maximum segment size is 64m. For reference, see https://www.ibm.com/docs/en/db2/11.5?topic=tables-space-requirements.

 

Example

For illustration, consider a table named LOBTEST0 in database schema MSCHUENE created as follows. The COMPACT and INLINE_LENGTH values for the LOB field are taken from the database catalog. The number of LOBs not inlined and the maximum LOB length are queried from the table using the functions ADMIN_IS_INLINED and LENGTH on the LOB field.

The table contains two CLOB fields, C1 and C3 with a size of 1gb and 1mb, respectively. Let’s assume the table is populated with data.

A basic check of the LOB object then shows the size of the LOB object (LOB_OBJECT_L_SIZE, LOB_OBJECT_P_SIZE) and the optimal (LOB_OBJECT_O_SIZE) size being almost equal. The optimal LOB size is the minimum size of the LOB field that can be reached with the current compactness and inline length. Note that this is a calculated, theoretical value. Therefore, small deviations are to be expected.

As a conclusion, in this scenario it is not possible to get space from the LOB object back to the tablespace by simply using reorganization activities.

Note that in the output of the table function, the size information for the LOB data is only available for the table, but not for the LOB fields themselves. However, the field LOB_OBJECT_O_SIZE gives you the calculated optimal size of each of the LOB fields since the table function evaluates them from the lengths of the individual LOBs of each data row.

Table function SAPTOOLS.LOBALLOC – optimize LOB free space and performance

As mentioned earlier in this blog post, the database can place small entries of an LOB field in the data pages of a table. This depends on the length of the LOB entry and the size of the inline length settings of the field being checked. Another option to affect the LOB size is the compactness.

The table function LOBALLOC can calculate the optimal LOB size of a table using modified (test) settings of the inline length and the compactness of the LOB fields. These test settings are specified in an additional column using XML format.

With the XML field XML_LOB_PARAMS, you can specify test values for the inline length and the compactness for multiple LOB fields in a single call.

The output fields then include the test settings marked in red below:

The test settings can change the values of fields marked blue:

  • Optimal LOB size (LOB_OBJECT_O_SIZE)
  • For a modified inline length, the number of LOB fields that are not inlined (CNT_NOT_INLINED). The compactness setting cannot modify this value.

You can call the table function LOBALLOC to test alternative values for compactness and inline length, see the examples below.

Check the increased inline length

How does the optimal size of the LOB object change if you increase the inline length of field C1 of table LOBTEST0 that was used above? The SQL command for this request is the following:

The XML data specifies the field name and the attribute change that we want to verify. As a result, you will get the following output:

With the modified inline length, the optimal LOB size (values of LOB_OBJECT_O_SIZE in the red boxes of the screenshot above) is only slightly smaller than the values of LOB_OBJECT_L_SIZE and LOB_OBJECT_P_SIZE. Indeed, the number of entries of table field C1 that are not inlined (output field CNT_NOT_INLINED) undergoes only a small change from 13369 to 13291.

Finally, the table function also shows you the number of entries that are not inlineable (field NOT_INLINEABLE) as the entries are larger than the maximum inline length (MAX_INLINE_LENGTH) that can be defined at the page size that is currently used.

Check the changed compactness

In the same way as with the inline length, you can check the effect of changed compactness. Below you can see how the LOB allocation is checked with COMPACT = 'Y' for field C1:

Since the compactness affects only the allocation of LOB segments, the only value that can change is the calculated optimal allocation. From the areas marked in red, you can easily see that the optimal LOB size of the table is considerably reduced.

Check multiple columns in a single SQL statement

The LOBALLOC table function can give the results for multiple changes on more than one LOB column as shown in the following example below:

For a better understanding, the XML specifications for each LOB field are shown in a structured manner. The part for the individual LOB fields is marked in red.

LOBALLOC in a DPF environment

What does the output of LOBALLOC look like in a DPF environment? See the following example:

Table DB2TEST.LOBALLOC is distributed across 4 partitions. The lines marked blue indicate rows that contain information by member, while the row marked red contains the total figures across all members. The information that is relevant for these rows are the LOB sizes (LOB_OBJECT_L_SIZE, LOB_OBJECT_P_SIZE, LOB_OBJECT_O_SIZE).

 

Conclusion

The LOB object of a table often has a large size. Maintaining LOB objects requires time and resources.

  • Reorganising the LOB object of a table implies that the table is inaccessible during the runtime of the REORG. A good alternative is to use the ADMIN_MOVE_TABLE procedure.
  • Options to influence the space allocation of an LOB object are the INLINE LENGTH and the COMPACT settings of the LOB fields of a table. However, changes of these settings require a REORG or ADMIN_MOVE_TABLE operation to make the change effective.
  • Db2 LUW does not provide an easy way to check the details of the space allocation of an LOB object. However, in SAP environments, you can use the LOBALLOC table function that helps you determine if a REORG or ADMIN_MOVE_TABLE operation can reduce the space allocation of the LOB object.
  • The LOBALLOC table function provides some insight into the allocation of the LOB object of a table. It can also assist you in determining the effect of changes to the INLINE LENGTH or COMPACT setting of LOB fields.

entry.title: SAP CDS Views DCL Access control with Authorization Objects
entry.content:
Hi, 

I have created the DCL access control using SU21 Authorization object, initially it was working and after i create multiple roles using same Auth object the DCL is not working ( Bringing all the data ), i even tried deleting the roles but still DCL is not working as expected.

Please advice,

 

Thank you.
SAP Access Control for SAP S/4HANA

entry.title: Re: How to trigger a workflow when doing a Temporary Chan...
entry.content:
Hello Volker

Thanks for the feedback

Regards

entry.title: Populating CDS Parameter with Bex Variable Value
entry.content:
I am building a Bex query using 2CIFIGLBALCMPCUBE as the transient provider.  This provider is using I_GLAcctBalanceComprnCube as the underlying CDS view.  This view has parameters that I am trying to populate with Bex variables.  The issue is that when I run the query, I get errors saying that the variables have to have a unique value assigned.  The variables are all set as mandatory single values so I'm not sure why it will not get to the variable screen.  Is it possible to pass a Bex variable value as the CDS view parameter?  Any help would be greatly appreciated.

CDS View

Bex Query showing variables

Error returned from query

entry.title: Create a cross tab with multiple rows
entry.content:
Hi All,

I need to create a report that is grouped/split by a ID into columns. The report has multiple rows, each row is a different field name.

I created a calculation view in SAP studio, and tried to create a cross tab that way... The columns work perfectly, how the rows are not. 
This is essentially the output I need. I am not sure if it better to create the row fields in crystal reports itself?
Please can I have some guidance. Any help is always appreciated.  

Thank you,
Jerusha

entry.title: SAP TM Charge Configuration Based on Unique Commodity Codes and Country Combinations
entry.content:
Hello SAP Community,

I’m working on configuring a charge calculation in SAP TM that applies based on the quantity of unique combinations of commodity codes and countries of manufacture in a customs clearance process done by the carrier. Specifically, I need to configure it so that:

  1. No charge is applied if there are 5 or fewer unique combinations of commodity codes and countries in the SAP TM Freight Order.
  2. A specific additional charge applies for each unique commodity/country combination exceeding the fifth entry.

For example:

  • If a shipment has 6 unique combinations of commodity codes and manufacturing countries, the charge would apply only to the 6th combination and onwards.

Has anyone successfully set up a similar charge structure? I’d appreciate any guidance on how to set up the necessary charge type, rate table, and calculation sheet to achieve this in standard. 

Thank you in advance for any insights or advice!

Best regards,

Aleksei

entry.title: SAP ePPDS - Max orders quantity per Product
entry.content:
Let's start confessing I'ma newbie to S4HANA PPDS, but ...
I've been told there is a maximum number of planned orders per location product that is max 500 orders.
Seems that after 500 orders that ePPDS stops generating orders.

Can this be reconfigured somehow, and why is this even existing?
Is it just defaulted at 500 due to some reason?
Do someone have experience with this limit or have successfully changed it. How high, and are there any risks?

Some background to my question:
Due to this constraint, and the fact we try to have a 1 year planning in PPDS, we are currently aggregating the orders by a 3 level horizon (daily, weekly, monthly).
And the aggregation itself is causing other problems for the supply chain.
So, I'd thought it would be nice to have daily orders for 365 days...

entry.title: Using GL Account Groups(KDH3) in CDS Views
entry.content: I am trying to use account groups that are created in KDH1 in CDS views.  However, the only hierarchies that are available are Financial Statement Versions created in OB58.  Is anyone aware of a way to use the account groups created in KDH1 in CDS views?  The specific scenario that I am working on is a report using consumption 2CIFIACTPLNJEIC which is using CDS view I_ActualPlanJrnlEntryItemCube.

entry.title: Datasphere repeat business unit for all dates
entry.content:
Hi,

I want to achieve below scenario in target view, new records should be created for each date for each business unit. So target view should have record for each date and business unit combination. There are other dimensions as well which should not be considered for combination.

 

Regards,

VK

entry.title: Re: Trigger an outbound Idoc when a PR is created.
entry.content:
How did you fill segnam, segnum and hlevel when filling records of MASTER_IDOC_DATA?

(If you have problem reading online help, look at the multiple MASTER_IDOC_CREATE* FM in your system)

entry.title: Re: SAP Analytics Cloud, embedded edition – the Way Ahead
entry.content:
I'm a bit confused on this topic. In all presentations of SAP about S4HANA Public Cloud, SAP Analytics Cloud (OEM) is still referred to. Is this the same as the "SAP Analytics Cloud, embedded edition" you are referring to here?

Can you please clarify this, @SaikrishnaBollineni ?

Thanks a lot.

entry.title: Re: Missing OData Service BankStatementPost_In in /IWFND/...
entry.content: it is soap api, not odata.

entry.title: Re: Application for Digital Skills Initiative: Introduction – Hamza Abbas, SAP Human Capital Managem
entry.content:
Hello,

Thank you for reaching out! I hope you’re doing well too.

My learning goal is to become a skilled SAP HCM Implementation Consultant. I’m currently specializing in various SAP HCM modules. I’m preparing for the SAP HCM Certification to further enhance my skills in this field. My aim is to build expertise not only in SAP HCM on-premise solutions but also in SAP SuccessFactors in the cloud. 

Thank you for your support, and I look forward to any guidance you can offer as I work toward this goal.

Best regards,
Hamza Abbas

entry.title: Re: internal table data not getting reflected in adobe fo...
entry.content: Then, obviously, it means that you didn't declare LT_ZMATVALIDITEM as the type ZTTMATVALIDITEM.

entry.title: Re: Transportation Cockpit View Exit Class: /SCMTMS/CL_UI...
entry.content:
SE24 transaction works for me. You can follow next instructions.

https://zevolving.com/2014/04/enhancement-framework-class-enhancement/

entry.title: How to handle x-www-form-urlencoded Content-Type header in SAP PI
entry.content:
Hi experts

I have a proxy to REST integration where I have the following header :

Content-Type: application/x-www-formurlencoded

This Integration is to be used to generate an access toke. The Request Body has the client-id and the client-secret. I am using the following blog for this without the dynamic URL part because I am working with a static URL.

https://community.sap.com/t5/technology-blogs-by-members/handling-x-www-form-urlencoded-format-using-rest-adapter/ba-p/13387849 

However I am unable to add the java mapping in the ESR because the jar file attached to the blog is not available anymore. This is also the first time I am working with java mapping and I am honestly quite lost. Most tutorials I have come across seem to be using Netweaver Developer Studio which I am unable to download because I do not have a S-user id. I am also not familiar with importing jar files and most sites I have found do not have anything pointing to those available for SAP PI 7.50 which I am using.

So, I was wondering if it is possible to handle this with a UDF? Also if it is, Do I need to create new data types or message types for this? Also, please guide me on how to write the UDF. I am very new to this so I would really appreciate it if someone could provide me a detailed answer or a link to a blog that provides a detailed answer. I have also gone through this blog without success.

Thank you

entry.title: story report not loading after migration to CSD
entry.content:
Hi

We migrated to CSD in our DEV instance this august. Since then we've had problems with Story Reports not loading. This happens both, when we open existing story reports, and when we try to create a new one. We receive no error messages - the story just loads and loads without end, until we give up. 
Some days it works, but most days they don't load.
Does anyone else experioence this? Could this be connected to the migration to CSD? Or would this problem have another cause?

Best regards
Merete Lintrup
HR Systems Manager

entry.title: Automatic Determination of Valuation Class based on Material group during Material master creation ?
entry.content:
There is client requirement to automatically determine the valuation class in accounting view based on material group provided in Basic data view in Material/Service master creation.

Is this possible in S/4HANA Cloud ?


------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
Learn more about the SAP Support user and program here.

entry.title: Re: Automatic Determination of Valuation Class based on M...
entry.content:
The customizing for Valuation Class assignment is at Material Type level , not Material Group

 

We have the configuration activates below for Valuation Class assignment which is also documented at the resource Configuration for Product Master Data

but it does not allow to specific Material Group 

 

 Define Account Category Reference
 Define Valuation Classes
 Define Account Category Reference/Material Type

 

The BADI BD_CMD_PROD_DATA_API_CHECK_2 (Extended Checks for Product Master Tables) , can be implemented via embedded Steampunk to perform a  custom validation in Manage Product Master Data if needed

entry.title: Re: How to resolve the SAP B1 Schema Export Failing with...
entry.content:
Hi pressfit 

 Please reconfigure the backup service working folder elsewhere and test issue again.

Kind Regards
Nidhi

entry.title: Re: If we have to delivered order tomorrow what will be t...
entry.content: Thanks Prasath

entry.title: CAP: CESU-8 encoding
entry.content:
I'm pulling some data from an API and trying to push update it into a table (cds entity) using CAP. In general everything is working as expected. 

But when I received few records in my data that have a different language (Cantonese in my case), then I get the below error while trying to update the table.

[SqlError: fatal error: invalid CESU-8 encoding for Unicode string] {
code: 3,
sqlState: 'HY000',
level: 1,
position: 0,
query: false
}

entry.title: Is it possible to enable custom annotations for CDS Language Support extension?
entry.content:
Hi!

I'd like to extend my CAP model with more assotiations ( which I'll use in my custom code ). 

For example something like this:

using { projects } from './projects';

@abap.ddic.table: ZPROJECTS
annotate projects with {
     @ABAP.ddic: {
        dataElement: {
            domain: {
                name: 'ZPROJECT_ID',
                description: 'Project Id',
                dataType: CHAR,
                length: 32                
            }
        }
    }
    id;

Is there a way to register a custom schema within the extension, that's how it will also see my new annotations and will enable code suggestions or enforce schema validations?

Thanks!

entry.title: Re: After upgrading to ByDesign 2411, how can you edit/mo...
entry.content:
Dear Dieter,

I am missing the edge case "Custom Form Template Maintenance". As mentioned in this blog post there is only one chance to edit Custom Form Templates (from PDI) within the system - with a PDI User: https://community.sap.com/t5/technology-q-a/custom-form-maintenance-byd/qaq-p/12555819 

Does this mean that future adaptions of Custom Form Templates (from PDI) must be edited via a Patch Solution in Cloud Application Studio?
This would be a huge overhead for small adaptions.

Kind regards

Christian

entry.title: Decimals not allowed for the product unit quantity (matl 1000103, batch 1000001604) error /SCWM/PRDI
entry.content:
I want to goods receipt to EWM with the material using a batch-specific unit of measure, so i got an error message; Decimals not allowed for the product unit quantity (matl 1000103, batch 1000001604) in /SCWM/PRDI screen also inbound delivery is blocked. 

Some details of the material; 

Is there any SAP note published for this problem? How can I solve this error?

entry.title: Re: Tips for Using Concurrent Employment in SuccessFactors Employee Central
entry.content:
Great blog.

We could also use "isPrimaryAssignmnet" in EP user table to quickly identify the primary assignment.

entry.title: Re: How to change message? One selected object cannot be processed.
entry.content: No. I didn't find a solution and needed to implement the button and action call manually

entry.title: Re: SAPui5 : change design of a label in a formelement
entry.content: Thanks, this was helpful

entry.title: Re: Regarding "Data Overview" of SAP for Me
entry.content: ご回答ありがとうございます。１回目の回答では、「レポートの頻度は毎月初回目のEWA生成に伴い生成し、頻度は変更できかねます。」と回答がありましたが、 ２回目の回答では、「月に1回という頻度が足りない場合、ノート２７１６６５５セクションOption 3. Manual DVM data collection in the SAP S/4 Hana Systemに従い、週１回マニュアルで生成可能です。またもしSOLUTION MANAGERシステム存在の場合、ノートセクションOption 1. Automated Self-Service - Auto GSSに従い、頻度を調査可能です。」と回答がありました。 １回目の回答では「頻度を変更できない」、２回目の回答では「頻度を変更できる」、という回答に読み取れました。 どちらの回答が正しいでしょうか。

entry.title: SSAM2310 - Adding new OrderType in Productive System without initial load
entry.content:
Hello communitiy,

we had our GoLive with SSAM2310 a few weeks ago and now have a requirement to add a new WorkOrder Type in the system.

The new WorkOrder Type e.g. Z01 has been customized for the PM WorkOrders.

I have added the WorkOrder Type in: 

- SAM2305_WORK_ORDER_GENERIC

--> Definition of the WorkOrders which should be visible on the SSAM 

--> This works fine after the Delta Synch and we can see the WorkOrders with Type Z01

- SAM2305_ORDER_TYPE

--> Definition which WorkOrders should be able to be created on SSAM and the base for the WorkOrder-List Filter and OrderType

--> This topic is not working without resetting and do an initial synch.

In the OMDO-Settings we used the standard config for General Settings:

So my understanding is, that each 720hours (30 days) there will be a refresh. (Thats a too long time)

We don't want to change something here

I aready tried to delete the Exchange Table Objects for OrderType via SE38 and /SYCLO/CORE_EXCH_PURGE_PROG, but this did not help.

Does anybody know, if there are other possibilities to clear any tables to get it worked without a reset and initial load? 

Regards 

Björn

entry.title: New Consumption Insights for Partners in SAP for Me
entry.content:
In continued support of our Partners, SAP is happy to announce that we have created additional consumption insights in SAP for Me. Keep reading to learn more about enhancements in Private Cloud and On-Premise Consumption.

Private Cloud Consumption

SAP Private Cloud Metering provides full transparency on the SAP Private Cloud consumption with monthly updated metering data. The metering data is made available in SAP for Me so that license gaps can be identified and clarified in a timely and product-specific manner.

 

Navigate to the Customer Success Dashboard and click on the Consumption tab.  

SAP is currently providing metering data for production and development systems. Once the technical requirements for automated metering are met, SAP will start the metering process accordingly. The end results will provide data for SAP Private Cloud Users (FUEs) and SAP Private Cloud Engines. More information on the metering requirements can be found on the SAP Private Cloud Metering page.

Please be aware that the card Cross Customer Private Cloud with Overusage shows the metering data for the FUE users only where an over usage has occurred. This indicate that the usage must be verified by the customer to make sure the data is accurate. More information on the verification process can be found on the SAP Private Cloud Metering page.

In this card, you can see all metrics in overusage across your customer base.

You can click on the customer name and navigate to the Customer Details Dashboard Consumption page to see all metrics for this specific customer.

Please note that the data may be unreliable during our current testing phase as we refine our processes for accuracy. We kindly ask for your patience and to refrain from raising tickets concerning this preliminary data for now.

You can click on the blue hyperlinks to view more details about specific metrics, trending data and material information:

Ongoing License Audits

On-Premise license audits are now displayed in SAP for Me in the Customer Success Dashboard on the Consumption tab.  Here you can see a high-level overview of ongoing On-Premise License Audits across your customers.

Click on the chevron to navigate to the specific details for this customer.

Here you can see the status for the specific customer audit and view tracking history. You can also upload measurement results and submit the Self Declaration Products form.

Click on Documents

to download your Measurement Plan or check for relevant Engine Notes.

These cards in SAP for Me replace the License Audit Cockpit for Partners in the Manage My Partnership application, which will be retired at the end of November 2024. Therefore, we recommend that you familiarize yourself with the functionality now. Review the 2 enablement videos to get familiar with the process and the License Audit Cockpit. Connect with your SAP contact (local e-mail list) with any questions.

Learn more about License Auditing.

entry.title: Re: Release strategy at Reservation
entry.content: Hi Andreas

entry.title: Re: SAP Payroll HCM Advanced Leave Payment (Annual Leave)...

I am not able to see the SAP AI Core in my Sub account Entitlements. Please guide me where I can find this service.

entry.content: How did you connect FSM and Datasphere?

entry.title: Re: what to do if a success factors learning video times out
entry.content: That sounds like they do not have the correct browser settings. Make sure the browser accepts 3rd party cookies. There are some KBAs about that.

Hi S_Sriram

while starting the SAP server dispatcher & message server are not working and remaining all services are working fine.

Thanks

Maladri

entry.title: Unable to fetch the status of Cancelled IRN and E-Waybill to eDocument Cockpit
entry.content:
How to update the status in eDocument Cockpit for the invoices for which IRN and E-Waybill are cancelled?


------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
Learn more about the SAP Support user and program here.

entry.title: Re: Unable to fetch the status of Cancelled IRN and E-Way...
entry.content:
Download the Response files of IRN and E-Waybill from the IRP and NIC Portals and use Contingency Mode.

E-Invoice Contingency:

Refer E8 of TSG 3295815 - GST IN: India eInvoice Automatic Solution: Troubleshooting Guide & FAQ

For detailed steps, you can also refer the below pointers:

  1. Login to IRP Portal: Access the Government IRP portal using the provided credentials.
  2. Navigate to Invoices: Locate the section where your processed invoices are listed or managed.
  3. Select Invoice: Identify the specific invoice for which you need to download the JSON response.
  4. View Invoice Details: Click on the invoice to view its details. You might find a "Details" or "View" option next to the invoice.
  5. Download JSON: Look for an option that allows you to download the JSON response related to that invoice. This option might be labeled as "Download Response," "View JSON," or something similar.
  6. Choose Download Location: Choose where you want to save the downloaded JSON response on your computer or device.
  7. Execute "Link IRN details to Document": Select Contingency Option -> Outbound Inv/Debit/Credit Memo -> Single Upload -> Selection Parameters -> Fill File Path.

E-Waybill Contingency:

Refer Contingency Mode | SAP Help Portal 

  1. Login to NIC and get the Response file for this eDocument.
  2. Download the Excel.
  3. Download the Template from the TSG 3415015
  4. Map the fields to Template and save it as suggested in the Help Portal Documentation.
  5. Use Contingency Mode as stated above in the Help Portal Documentation.

For template, please download the one from the attachments of 3415015 - GST IN: India Eway bill automatic solution: Troubleshooting guide and FAQ

entry.title: Re: what to do if a success factors learning video times out
entry.content: I have found that the timeout error does not appear or appears much later if videos are packaged into a SCORM package. Just in case it helps.

entry.title: Re: How to manage sequence of functions in SAP PaPM Cloud?
entry.content:
Hi Sergion,

This is not quite a chain that you want to achieve but a sequence run for each writer function. What you did is correct to have a join and run the writer functions and write to several HANA tables. But to choose the sequence, there is an option to do this in Process Template as execution activity for each writer. But this means you will need to run then independently. OR.

Use the Process Scheduler https://community.sap.com/t5/financial-management-blogs-by-sap/process-scheduler-execution-made-easy-by-scheduling-a-job-in-sap/ba-p/13531486 

You can again use your writers in an activity inside a process template and schedule their Run depending on your sequence. 1 Job/Schedule = 1 Execution Activity (writer) so they will run in the schedule that you want. 

I hope this provides a little help.

entry.title: SAP GUI - hint - exact match instead of best match
entry.content:
Hello, general in SAP GUI, there are transactions where text fields offer search hints when a user is typing. Hints show the best matches. Users want when they start typing, the search hint to not show best matches, but to show exact matches only.

Is it possible, to change hints from best match to exact match?

Thank you.

entry.title: Re: Advanced Intercompany Stock Transfer in SAP S/4HANA OP/Private Cloud
entry.content:
Thank you for this post.

 

Does this functionality support Global Trade Management?

 

Thank you


Alessandro

entry.title: Re: Calling All SAP Partners: Join the SAP Customer Engagement Initiative Cycle-3 2024!
entry.content: @DavidBirkenbach The problem should be resolved now.

entry.title: Alternative to opt-out directly via the button “Unsubscribe” in email clients
entry.content:
Hi Emarsys,

 

We'd like to remove the possibility for our contacts to unsubscribe directly via the “Unsubscribe” button located at the top of the emails in gmail, outlook or other e-mail providers. We'd like to hide/delete the standard email “Unsubscribe” button on the top of every email and only use our own current “Unsubscribe” link (bottom of the email)

 

How can we achieve this please ?

 

Thank you for your help.


------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
Learn more about the SAP Support user and program here.

entry.title: Re: Alternative to opt-out directly via the button “Unsub...
entry.content:
If you are talking about the List-unsubscribe feature that is described at this SAP Emarsys Help document, I'm afraid to confirm that it's not possible to disable it.

This feature has been an industry-standard for the last years and is considered best practice, allowing providers and consumers alike to easily identify reputable senders as explained at the document linked above:

No good will ever come from sending emails to people who don’t want to receive them, so it is always in your interests to let them opt out. All commercial mail clients display prominent Report as Spam buttons in their toolbar which serves this function, but since this will also harm your reputation, you need to compete with this for visibility and ease of use.

  • List-unsubscribe reduces complaints, as mail clients give this button equal prominence with Report as Spam.
    Since List-unsubscribe was an initiative from ISPs, including it in your mail header is a sign of good faith. Some clients even regard the words click here to unsubscribe as spam filter keywords. It also allows unsubscribe reputation services to more reliably monitor your unsubscribe compliance.
  • List-unsubscribe improves deliverability and helps you avoid spam filters.
    In the same way that airlines show you the emergency exits before take-off, a prominent unsubscribe button increases confidence in your brand and makes contacts more comfortable receiving your marketing messages. Negative user feedback (like the "Report Spam" button) is one of the most significant factors in determining the sender reputation at the major ISPs, which is why the List-unsubscribe is strongly recommended by Gmail, for example.
  • In other words, List-unsubscribe increases engagement by building trust across the entire email marketing landscape.

The only scenario where the List-unsubscribe is not added is when you send Triggered Emails and the Transactional opt-in feature is activated in your account.

entry.title: New Learning Experience / Custom Cards: Can't edit
entry.content:
Hello there, 

Whenever I try to edit custom cards from the new landing page, I am blocked by this error. Any ideas?

I am supposed to be an admin with most if not all permissions. I have tested several images and even uploaded one that acts as placeholder for an already existing custom card, just to rule out a wrong-size error. This does not fix the problem.

I want to copy from Actual to Forecast version till the Actual version data locked for that Current CY.

For example, version Actual locked till month 202409, then I can copy Actual version data to Forecast till 202409 for the current CY.

How to know the Data lock information in Advance formulas. 

Regards,

Vasu

entry.title: Re: what to do if a success factors learning video times out

entry.title: How to see Packing Instruction POP2 Change History
entry.content:
Hi 

I am check Packing Instruction in POP2. It seems  target quantity has been changed. We need to identify it what value was changed. As it is new material so We dont have existing data for it.  we can see last change date and user but can not see the list

Could you advise how to see change history in POP2 for value

 

Regards

RK

entry.title: Re: Rankby Top5 values in a chart usign a script
entry.content:
I am not that familiar with this API, but by looking at the documentation https://help.sap.com/doc/1639cb9ccaa54b2592224df577abe822/release/en-US/index.html#ChartRankOptions I assume it should be a JSON, like

Chart_1.rankby({structureMember: "xxx", RankOrder:Top, value:5})

Could you try?

entry.title: To create a mapping, use the development system (3SL) or Q system (2SL) in 'Renumber G/L Accounts
entry.content:
We are trying to enter Renumber G/L accounts customizing activity, but get the following error: 

To create a mapping, use the development system (3SL) or Q system (2SL).

 


------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
Learn more about the SAP Support user and program here.

entry.title: Re: To create a mapping, use the development system (3SL)...
entry.content:
This issue is caused because Current system type is not supported for renumbering the G/L accounts.

Based on the landscapes, you can find the right system to renumber the G/L accounts.

  1. For the 2SL landscape, use the Quality(TEST) system.
  2. For the 3SL landscape, use the Development Customizing client.

Note: Starter or Partner Demo Customizing/Developments Tenants are not supported for G/L account numbering.

Kindly check the KBA 3289450 for more information.

entry.title: Urgent - handling units are missing in vekp/vepo tables but available in document flow of a delivery
entry.content:
We are receiving an inbound idoc to post goods issue using the message type - SHP_OBDLV_CONFIRM_DECENTRAL.

FM used is BAPI_OUTB_DELIVERY_CONFIRM_DEC.

Idoc is getting processed successfully but handling units are not getting created in the tables VEKP and VEPO.

But we can see the handling units in the document flow of a delivery.

We tried to debug it multiple times, couldnt find any error .

entry.content:
During Upgrade from 9.2 PL06 to 10.200 (2208) keep getting error on table SVCLOG. (table has no records)

get the following warnings which we could skip before.

Pre-Upgrade Test Warning (1076082) Unregistered UDTs were found
Pre-Upgrade Test Warning (1076082) Undefined UDFs were found
Pre-Upgrade Test Warning (2948110) The detected compatibility level of the MSSQL database is lower than required.

UpgStep-Table Upg ...Failed, error code: -1

entry.title: Re: Is it possible to enable custom annotations for CDS Language Support extension?
entry.content:
Hi @pepl ,

Do you want to implement this specific annotation, or any annotation in general?
Could you include maybe what should this code fragment example you shared should do regarding the $metadata?

Regards,
Peter

entry.title: What are reasons for TRDIR-UDAT getting updated apart from importing a transport request?
entry.content:
Hi All!

I already searched the forums but wasn't able to find a good explanation for what I'm seeing in our NW7.50 EHP8 system:

  • A SAP Standard include (e.g. MF02DO00) shows a recent date of 2024-09-04 in TRDIR-UDAT
  • TRDIR-SDATE and TRDIR-IDATE also show 2024-09-04
  • When looking at versioning, the last transport is actually from some SPAU activitity associated with an SPS-Upgrade from 2 years ago which was imported on 2022-12-03

I'm wondering if this apparent discrepancy might be due to e.g. some of the many DDIC-objects used in the code getting imported via a transport request (which would fit the dates timing-wise), necessitating a re-generation of the code and hence updating the dates in TRDIR. Is that a feasible explanation and if not, what else would be causing an update to these dates?

Thanks much for any feedback you might have!

Cheers

Bärbel

entry.title: Re: CAP: CESU-8 encoding
entry.content:
Hi @viren_chawda ,

Could you describe the scenario in more detail? E.g.:

  • Could you share an example request you try to send?
  • Are you invoking an endpoint of your service?
    • Is it an action or a CREATE event maybe?
    • Do you have any custom actions attached to it?

Regards,
Peter

entry.title: Re: Inspection Lot number cannot be displayed on the ERP Client
entry.content:
Hello,
I founded missing configuration. The Installation conf. was missing.
SAP Customizing Implementation Guide -> SCM Extended Warehouse Management -> Extended Warehouse Management -> Cross-Process Settings -> Quality Management -> Quality Management for Decentralized EWM -> Basics and Integration -> Communication with an External QM System -> Define External QM Systems

entry.title: Re: Inspection Lot number cannot be displayed on the ERP Client
entry.content:
Hello, I founded missing configuration. Installation was missing. Here is path:
SAP Customizing Implementation Guide -> SCM Extended Warehouse Management -> Extended Warehouse Management -> Cross-Process Settings -> Quality Management -> Quality Management for Decentralized EWM -> Basics and Integration -> Communication with an External QM System -> Define External QM Systems

entry.title: Re: Detailed Phased approach for BW/4HANA In-place conver...
entry.content:
Hello Eduard,

We have converted Classical DSO data flow to a ADSO flow in Dev and QA separately with the conversion tool (In-Place). The Source is a classical DSO and Target is a Infoobject.

What we notice after conversion in both the system is, the TRFN IDs between Infoobject and ADSOs are different in DEV and QA post conversion.

Hence the question, how will future changes could be transported from DEV to QA in future if TRFNIDs are different?

entry.title: SAP Cloud ALM, memory extension to be discontinued
entry.content:
The SAP Cloud ALM, memory extension which was available as CPEA will be discontinued. Indeed this memory extension did not fully meet the needs from the customers. Customers have needs for additional memory but they also need additional outbound API volume and lots of customers expressed the need for additional SAP Cloud ALM tenants.

Therefore SAP has commercialized a new offering called SAP Cloud ALM, tenant extension which comprises:

  • 8 GB of additional HANA memory
  • 8 GB of additional outbound API data transfer
  • the right to provision an addition SAP Cloud ALM tenant.

All details can be found in this blog.

What is the process for technical migration?

There is no need for any migration, your existing SAP Cloud ALM tenant(s) remains fully functional. if you still need additional memory, you can either wait for your CPEA contract to expire or directly subscribe the SAP Cloud ALM, tenant extension material and save your CPEA credits for other purposes.

entry.title: On iPhone the redraw method is not working for all Controls
entry.content:
In my MDK-Application on iPhone I want to hide and show controls dynamically by setting the visible property by a rule. For a few Controls it is not working, for example simpleProperty. If I add a rule to the "IsVisible" property the rule is not executed when I do a redraw. For other controls it is working as expected (for example ObjectCellItem)
Only when I navigate to the Page the rule for "IsVisible" is executed.

For testing I created a new MDK Project in BAS with the Base template. I added only

  • one simple property with a rule for "IsVisible"
  • one button for switching visibility and redrawing the page
  • one button for navigating to the same page.

The redraw button has no effect (the rule for "IsVisible" is not executed). With navigation it is working.

Here is my code:

The three controls in Main.page

 

"Controls": [
						{
							"_Type": "Control.Type.FormCell.SimpleProperty",
							"_Name": "FormCellSimpleProperty0",
							"IsVisible": "/Test/Rules/visible.js",
							"Separator": true,
							"Caption": "Caption",
							"PlaceHolder": "PlaceHolder",
							"Enabled": true,
							"IsEditable": true
						},
						{
							"_Type": "Control.Type.FormCell.Button",
							"_Name": "FormCellButton0",
							"IsVisible": true,
							"Separator": true,
							"Title": "Redraw",
							"Alignment": "Center",
							"ButtonType": "Text",
							"Semantic": "Tint",
							"Image": "res://mdk_logo.png",
							"ImagePosition": "Leading",
							"Enabled": true,
							"OnPress": "/Test/Rules/redraw.js"
						},
						{
							"_Type": "Control.Type.FormCell.Button",
							"_Name": "FormCellButton1",
							"IsVisible": true,
							"Separator": true,
							"Title": "navigate",
							"Alignment": "Center",
							"ButtonType": "Text",
							"Semantic": "Tint",
							"Image": "res://mdk_logo.png",
							"ImagePosition": "Leading",
							"Enabled": true,
							"OnPress": "/Test/Rules/navigate.js"
						}

 

Rules/init.js

 

export default function init(clientAPI) {
    clientAPI.getAppClientData().visible = true;
}

 

Rules/redraw.js

 

export default function redraw(clientAPI) {
    clientAPI.getAppClientData().visible = !clientAPI.getAppClientData().visible
    clientAPI.evaluateTargetPath("#Page:Main").redraw();
}

 

 Rules/navigate.js

 

export default function navigate(clientAPI) {
    return clientAPI.executeAction({
        "Name": "/Test/Actions/GenericNavigation.action",
        "Properties": {
            "PageToOpen": "/Test/Pages/Main.page",
            "clearHistory": true
        }
    });
}

 

Rules/visible.js

 

export default function visible(clientAPI) {
    return clientAPI.getAppClientData().visible;
}

 

Tested with MDK-Client 24.7.0

entry.title: Sales Document is always empty in Fiori App F4111. Is it possible to display values here?
entry.content:
We have activated the app F4111 Manage Prices Sales in our environment and noticed that the Sales Document and Payment Terms columns are always shown blank. 

Is it possible to show values for these fields?

There was a KBA that has now been removed (3156108) that fields without Global Field Names are not supported. Is there an update or a solution available now?

entry.title: Release 2411 - What´s coming ?
entry.content:
It´s always important to understand the content of Releases. You can have an excellent idea about what´s coming and links to access the Roadmap for Best Practices.

There will be enhancements in 2411 for Spend Control Tower, Supplier Management (SLP and Risk), SAP Business Network, Category Management  and Guided Sourcing. Enjoy

Go to this link . https://community.sap.com/t5/spend-management-blogs-by-sap/sap-ariba-2411-release-key-innovations-preview/ba-p/13916252

Remember that you can use the Language translation in your browser (if allowed) to see the text more easily (click the right button over the text).

entry.title: Re: CDSFiori Elements – Object Page – Chart Facet Error:ApplySupported is not added to the annotatio
entry.content:
Hi,

could you please explain how I can add it locally? I face the same problem.

 

Thank you.

entry.title: How to edit Number Range Interval for QIE_IDOC
entry.content:
Hello,
I need to delete or edit an incorrectly assigned number range interval for QIE_IDOC in the QA system (not in the production system). I attempted to overwrite it via TR from the development to QA system, but it was unsuccessful. Is there a way to edit or delete this number range? I am also open to table editing as a last resort. Currently, some products are associated with this number range, but I can post goods issues for these products.

entry.title: Re: How to manage sequence of functions in SAP PaPM Cloud?
entry.content:
Hi Paulo,

Thanks for your input! I appreciate the suggestion of using the Process Scheduler. However, I was hoping to avoid the need for scheduling the executions at a specific time.

What I’m really looking for is a way to execute all the functions in the right order by pressing a single button - any time I need it - without setting up a timed schedule. Ideally, I’d like to configure a single execution chain where I can trigger each Writer function in sequence, ensuring each function completes before the next one starts.

Is there a way to achieve this, or perhaps any other tools in PaPM that would allow for this type of flexible, on-demand sequential execution?

Thanks again for your help!

entry.title: Re: SAP Sales and Service Cloud Version 2 - Q3 Fall Release Highlights Webcast
entry.content: Hello, where can I find the slides of yesterdays Q3-2024 Release Overview webcast? It is not available in the replay webcast library. Thank you.

entry.title: Re: Detailed Phased approach for BW/4HANA In-place conver...
entry.content:
Hi,

Independent of the Conversion functionality, the TRFN-ID is always generated within the system and is dependent on the system, source and target information. That is the reason why TRFN can have different ID.

See SAP 2774555 - Technical names of Transformations

Transporting will be possible, anyway.

Best Regards,

Eduard

entry.title: Re: RAP factory action: Response with deep result possible?
Re: SAP Payroll HCM Advanced Leave Payment (Annual Leave) Salary Hold
entry.content: Reinstating what I had mentioned in my first comment "Hi, In that case, use mashup to lock the employee or create a background job to lock employee on start date of absent and unlock on end date. But best practice would be LOA with status change."

entry.title: readiness check not performed
entry.content:
Hi all,

the new mta generator generate readiness checks. But in my case, the readiness check is not performed.

does anyone have the same problem?

 

sample: https://github.com/qby-ankul/cls-custom-fields-demo/blob/main/mta.yaml#L22

entry.title: Re: SAP Data Services 4.3 Upgrade steps
entry.content:
The IPS v4.3 installation is missing a crucial info that new IPS license key is required if you perform upgrade.  The installer clearly listing entering new IPS v4.3 license key into CMC.

This seems to be the same poor BODS Upgrade document for IPS 4.1->4.2, and now 4.2->4.3.  The upgrade document doesn't indicate this upgrade will required to enter new IPS v4.3.  Even running the InstallIPS.exe from IPS v4.3, it doesn't auto supply the bundled v4.3 license key

entry.title: Can we use Scheduling Agreement with Delivery Order in combination with consignment?
entry.content: We are using Scheduling agreement with Delivery order (order types LZM / TAM) in ECC. Customer sends the forecast monthly via EDI and then sends call off to create the Delivery order. Now we are moving to S/4 HANA with 2020 version and I have an additional requirement to combine this process with consignment, meaning instead of creating a delivery order to ship to the customer, we want to create a delivery order to fill up the consignment stock. Does anyone know if this is feasible? Thank you for your comments and time!

entry.title: Re: Working with S/4 HANA Migration Cockpit ( LTMC) - some sticky notes
entry.content:
Hi Sir,

Is there any table which stores the mapping between external number - internal number loaded through LTMC having internal number assignment.
Thanks in advance.

entry.title: Re: How to move all stock to Quarantine or scrap if we ha...
entry.content:
Using user groups in the BMBC report can be achieved.

https://community.sap.com/t5/enterprise-resource-planning-blogs-by-members/excluding-expired-batches-from-mrp-run/ba-p/13323609

entry.title: SAP Fiori development newsletter November 2024 (issue #31)
entry.content:
If you are like us, you are already thinking about your plans for 2025 and prioritizing topics. What technologies to embrace and which to de-prioritize? Which apps will deliver the biggest returns for the business units with whom you work?

At SAP, we are thinking about what innovations will make it easier for you to build SAP Fiori apps and how to integrate AI into the development process as well as the SAP Fiori elements framework.

Our next SAP Fiori Innovation Day is in Heidelberg on Tuesday, November 19 will focus on the intersection between AI and SAP Fiori. A few seats remain, so please register soon if you are interested in learning about the intersection between AI and SAP Fiori.

We are planning our 2025 SAP Fiori Innovation Day events. Please let us know if you are interested in joining us as we bring our team of SAP experts and partners to a city near you. 

If you want to meet with fellow developers and the SAP engineers who build our professional development tools, I encourage you to join our monthly SAP Fiori elements and SAP Fiori tools roundtable group. Our next meeting is Wednesday, November 13, 2024. You can also email me if you would like an invitation.

If you prefer to receive this in your inbox, please subscribe to the SAP Fiori development newsletter.

Since this is our last issue of 2024, we would like to extend our best wishes for a happy holiday season.

 

 

 

 

 

 

 

 

Development News

Introducing the new Adaptation Editor experience for SAPUI5 adaptation projects

To improve the development experience and harmonize the editors for SAPUI5 adaptation projects offered in SAP Business Application Studio (BAS) and Visual Studio Code, BAS now features the new Adaptation Editor, replacing the SAPUI5 Visual Editor.

https://community.sap.com/t5/technology-blogs-by-sap/introducing-the-new-adaptation-editor-experience-for-sapui5-adaptation/ba-p/13923903

Explore SAPUI5 freestyle development with Joule

Joule in SAP Build Code supports you with generative AI features to speed up SAPUI5 app development. Explore step-by-step guidance, AI-driven code suggestions, and advanced formatting options to bring your projects to life quickly and efficiently.

https://community.sap.com/t5/technology-blogs-by-sap/ui5-freestyle-development-in-sap-build-code-with-joule/ba-p/13897852

Product updates for SAP Build Code – October 2024 edition

SAP Build Code brings powerful enhancements for SAP Fiori developers. With Joule's AI-powered code search and in-line coding assistance, you can quickly find code snippets and get smart suggestions. Plus, streamline your UI customization with the new Adaptation Editor for SAPUI5 projects, and ensure good code quality with UI5 Linter v1.0. Discover more SAP Build Code updates:

https://community.sap.com/t5/technology-blogs-by-sap/product-updates-for-sap-build-code-october-2024-edition/ba-p/13923399

UI5 linter v1.0 now available

The UI5 team is happy to announce the official release of UI5 linter v1.0, a static code analysis tool for UI5 projects. Over the past few months, valuable community feedback has been incorporated and the tool has been enhanced with additional detection features. Explore the improvements in this blog post:

https://community.sap.com/t5/technology-blogs-by-sap/release-of-ui5-linter-v1-0/ba-p/13880556

Smart choices for your UI: When to use sap.ui.mdc

sap.ui.mdc is a specialized library within SAPUI5. It is designed to enhance user experience with advanced controls and features, helping you build metadata-driven controls (like smart controls) and applications. This post describes some scenarios where it might be the right choice for your project.

https://community.sap.com/t5/technology-blogs-by-sap/smart-choices-for-your-ui-when-to-use-sap-ui-mdc/ba-p/13869819

From JavaScript to TypeScript: how we enhanced code reliability in SAPUI5 development

We have published several articles on the advantages of TypeScript. This post describes one team’s journey to improve their code quality.

https://community.sap.com/t5/technology-blogs-by-members/1-3-from-javascript-to-typescript-how-we-enhanced-code-reliability-in/ba-p/13878726

https://community.sap.com/t5/technology-blogs-by-members/2-3-from-javascript-to-typescript-how-we-enhanced-code-reliability-in/ba-p/13925918

Events

SAP Fiori Innovation Day in Heidelberg on November 19

After our successful events in Dublin and Chicago, we are bringing SAP Fiori Innovation Day back to Europe. The next one will be in Heidelberg on November 19. By attending this event, you will learn:

  • SAP’s UX strategy and how it is evolving
  • Recent UX innovations that fulfill the promise of the intelligent, collaborative enterprise
  • Making SAP Fiori work for you – finding the apps you need and adapting them to your business requirements
  • Building apps using the latest tools and technologies – the same ones SAP uses to build apps for SAP S/4HANA
  • How to move your organization forward, including how to take advantage of AI for developing applications

Register today:
https://events.sap.com/eur/sap-fiori-innovation-day-heidelberg-2024/en/home

SAP Fiori Innovation Days 2025

We are planning our 2025 SAP Fiori Innovation Day schedule. Please let us know which location you might be interested in joining us.

We will not have events in every location, but we want to get a sense of where you are willing to travel to learn about SAP Fiori app development (see topics above).
https://events.sap.com/sap-fiori-innovation-day-2025/en/home

SAP TechEd recap

There were many announcements at SAP TechEd 2024. Here is a consolidated and simplified digest.

https://community.sap.com/t5/technology-blogs-by-sap/sap-teched-2024-announcements-consolidated-and-simplified/ba-p/13900729

UI5ers Live – November 14

The UI5 team will explore AI-powered SAPUI5 coding with Joule, and the Test Starter, a new concept to streamline test setup for OpenUI5 in the upcoming edition of UI5ers live:

Register here: https://openui5.org/events/#id=ui5ers-43

Steer the future of SAP Build at the SAP BTP Usability Event

Would you like to help steer the future direction of SAP Build products like SAP Build Work Zone, CDS-Modeler, SAP Build Apps, SAP Build Process Automation, UI5?  If so, please join us on November 25-26, 2024 at our headquarters in Walldorf, where you can:

  • Gain early insights into SAP's product vision, ideas, and research projects
  • Share ideas directly with the development teams and influence product development
  • Participate in the development of products that better meet your needs and help your business
  • Provide valuable input on new features directly to the engineering teams during 1:1 usability testing sessions
  • Access expert talks and networking opportunities

To register, contact Marina Kellermann (standard SAP email format) before November 15. She can send you all the details around the full agenda, accommodations, etc.

Tutorials

openSAP content has moved to the learning.sap.com platform

Developing and Extending SAP Fiori Elements Apps
https://learning.sap.com/courses/developing-and-extending-sap-fiori-elements-apps

Developing an SAP Fiori Elements App Based on a CAP OData V4 Service
https://learning.sap.com/learning-journeys/developing-an-sap-fiori-elements-app-based-on-a-cap-odata...

Getting Started with Creating an SAP Fiori Elements App Based on an OData V4 RAP Service

This new learning journey guides you through building SAP Fiori elements applications from scratch using a RAP OData V4 service.
https://learning.sap.com/learning-journeys/getting-started-with-creating-an-sap-fiori-elements-app-b...

Adapting the UI in SAP S/4HANA Cloud Using SAP Screen Personas

https://learning.sap.com/courses/adapting-the-ui-in-sap-s-4hana-cloud-using-sap-screen-personas

Tutorial: Key User Adaptation for SAPUI5 applications

To extend SAPUI5 applications, SAPUI5 Flexibility offers capabilities not only for developers, but also for key users and end users using simple visual / WYSIWYG tools.
https://community.sap.com/t5/technology-blogs-by-sap/new-tutorial-mission-key-user-adaptation-for-sa...

Tutorial: SAPUI5 Adaptation Projects for SAP S/4HANA Cloud

SAPUI5 Adaptation Projects in SAP Business Application Studio are not new. What is new, is the support for SAP S/HANA Cloud. This enables developers to enhance SAPUI5 applications in SAP S/4HANA Cloud with features that were previously only for on-premise customers. See this blog post linking to an extensive, end-to-end tutorial:
https://community.sap.com/t5/enterprise-resource-planning-blogs-by-sap/extending-sap-s-4hana-cloud-p...

Back issues from the past year

SAP Fiori development newsletter September 2024 (issue #30)

SAP Fiori development newsletter July 2024 (issue #29)

SAP FIori development newsletter May 2024 (#28)

SAP Fiori development newsletter March 2024 (#27)

SAP Fiori development newsletter January 2024 (#26)

SAP Fiori development newsletter November 2023 (#25)

entry.title: Batch Determination with FEFO in STO
entry.content:
Dear SAP experts, 

I have a requierement to activate FEFO in STO (PO with UB type), The FEFO strategy is already created and activated for transfers via MIGO, but in STO  I don't know if it's possible or not 

Could you please help 

Thank you in advance

entry.title: Re: Urgent - handling units are missing in vekp/vepo tabl...
entry.content:
I would be looking at an OSS note like the following (or any other similar ones that are relevant for your scenario) - 3039599 - Regular issues with cross delivery HUs in ERP 

 

Regards,

Ryan Crosby
